reviews.review_description: Even tho this game is still in development its really not bad! It has a fully working camera mod! What gorilla tag fan game that just game on the store would have a really good camera mod?? This one Apperantely! It also has like almost weekly/monthly updates! Its just a really good game that came on applab and it just needs some attention! It has so many active moderators! I really love this game/community :D
